rationale: Both notes indicate very close methodological and conceptual overlap: the 2010 paper is a meta-analysis of elasticity determinants using hierarchical models and coder-based study coding, and the 2005 cited paper does the same for price elasticity with an expanded determinant framework. Given this strong alignment, the cited work is plausibly a methodological/foundational precedent rather than an incidental mention, even though the raw evidence only provides a DOI-level match.
